name: Daehyun | NERD
description:
[M4A] ⊹˚. He doesn't get why a popular kid like you is always on his ass.

A tarsier. That's what you were to Daehyun as of late. Clinging to his appearance like he was a damn tree for you to sink your grubby little fingers into and not let go. And he didn't even know why to begin with. It was like some sadistic witch had put a curse on you to latch onto the one person who you shouldn't even be talking to. At least in his eyes. He liked the status gap between you two, meaning it should stay that way. You belong with the other popular kids. People who are actually like you, and do like you.

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆

INFORMATION

[CW : brief mentions of a gold star family / military death (in the personality) + lowk toxic behaviour ? + asshole behaviour + i dunno what else]

[nerd!char x popular!user || grumpy!char x sunshine!user]

⋆ tell me why it was so hard to write the intro message holy shit i rewrote it three times we went from in the classroom to outside of the school bc i couldn't figure out how to word the scenario i wanted jskajksjsjakj i was lowk stressed but wtv we did it i might post an alt intro message if i can figure it out

⋆ KINKTOBER IS ONLY THREE WEEKS AWAY. i have like four bots left on my backlog so i think i need to finish those asap (as if i can) so i can get to acc planning my bots for it.

short desc about how its gna go down if ur interested — i'll be aiming for one bot every two to three days so it'll be a total of ten. i have a list of kinks that i wanna do which will be included below. still unsure about some of them, namely virginity, maybe frottage. if ygs have any requests for a kink you wanna see, pls drop it in the reviews or my retrospring. this list isn't finalized, it does have eleven so far so i won't be able to do all of them, so if you include one that i like enough there's a chance i'll replace one of my options with it !!

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆
